text.title: lint-precommit-floor Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lint-precommit-floor as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating the hook as advisory and adding it only on the developer's machine, not in the pinned config in the repository.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A hook that is not in .pre-commit-config.yaml (or lefthook.yml) is invisible to teammates and to agents — the contract collapses to a single human's habits.

failure-mode.description: Choosing husky for a polyglot Python+TS+Terraform repo because the lead developer "knows npm".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: husky has no Python isolation and no Terraform plug-ins; you end up shelling out to global tools that drift between machines, defeating the gate's determinism.
